caption:
Ever get a call that changes everything before the sun even comes up?

Some loyalties run deeper than blood.
Some debts you didn't sign up for — but they got your name on them anyway.

Jace is about to find out what happens when your brother's choices become your countdown.

72 hours. No room for error.

Episode 1 drops NOW. Link in bio.
Follow the series — this is only the beginning. 🔥
twitterLine:
"Then you already know."

Marcus cut a deal. Jace has 72 hours.

Out the Way — Episode 1: FIRST LIGHT is here. Watch it now.
teaserScript: A burner phone lights up at 5AM. Some calls you can't ignore. His brother's in prison. His cousin just intercepted a message with HIS name on it. 72 hours. Jace is running out of time.
thumbnailPrompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic thumbnail. A young Black man in his mid-20s, Jace, standing in a dark room lit only by the cold blue glow of a phone screen pressed to his ear. His expression is a mix of dread and resolve — jaw tight, eyes intense. Shallow depth of field. Moody, noir-inspired lighting with deep shadows. The phone screen casts sharp light across half his face. Gritty urban drama aesthetic. Text overlay at bottom in bold white: '72 HOURS' and small subtitle 'EP. 1 — FIRST LIGHT'. High contrast, film grain texture, cinematic color grading with teal and orange undertones.
emotionBait: Jace carries his cousin's loyalty and his childhood love's dream on his shoulders — only to discover his own brother just signed a deal that puts a target on his back.
